entries.sentence: We studied modern art at the gallery.
entries.chinese: art = 艺术；我们在画廊学习了现代艺术。

entries.sentence: The audience clapped loudly at the end of the show.
entries.chinese: audience = 观众；演出结束时，观众热烈鼓掌。

entries.sentence: We played a board game after dinner.
entries.chinese: board game = 棋盘游戏；晚饭后我们玩了一个棋盘游戏。

entries.sentence: My favourite character in the story is a brave girl.
entries.chinese: character = 人物；故事中我最喜欢的人物是一个勇敢的女孩。

entries.sentence: My parents watched a chat show last night.
entries.chinese: chat show = 访谈节目；我父母昨晚看了一个访谈节目。

entries.sentence: Let us meet outside the cinema at seven.
entries.chinese: cinema = 电影院；我们七点在电影院外见面吧。

entries.sentence: Mia joined the school photography club.
entries.chinese: club = 俱乐部；米娅加入了学校摄影俱乐部。

entries.sentence: Leo reads a comic on the bus to school.
entries.chinese: comic = 连环漫画；利奥在去学校的公交车上看连环漫画。

entries.sentence: The band gave a concert in the town hall.
entries.chinese: concert = 音乐会；乐队在市政厅举办了一场音乐会。

entries.sentence: We learned a traditional dance at the festival.
entries.chinese: dance = 舞蹈；我们在节日活动中学了一种传统舞蹈。

entries.sentence: Ella enjoys dancing with her friends.
entries.chinese: dancing = 跳舞；埃拉喜欢和朋友们一起跳舞。

entries.sentence: The detective found an important clue in the room.
entries.chinese: detective = 侦探；侦探在房间里发现了一条重要线索。

entries.sentence: Our school drama is about friendship.
entries.chinese: drama = 戏剧；我们的校园戏剧讲的是友谊。

entries.sentence: Please draw a map of the route to your house.
entries.chinese: draw = 画；请画一张去你家的路线图。

entries.sentence: Her drawing of the old bridge won a prize.
entries.chinese: drawing = 图画；她画的那座老桥获得了奖项。

entries.sentence: Our town holds a music festival every summer.
entries.chinese: festival = 节日活动；我们镇每年夏天都举办音乐节。

entries.sentence: We watched a funny film on Friday evening.
entries.chinese: film = 电影；星期五晚上我们看了一部有趣的电影。

entries.sentence: The young film maker recorded life in the village.
entries.chinese: film maker = 电影制作人；这位年轻的电影制作人记录了村里的生活。

entries.sentence: A bright firework exploded above the park.
entries.chinese: firework = 烟花；一朵明亮的烟花在公园上空绽放。

entries.sentence: The local gallery displays paintings by young artists.
entries.chinese: gallery = 画廊；当地画廊展出年轻艺术家的画作。

entries.sentence: This game is easy to learn but hard to win.
entries.chinese: game = 游戏；这个游戏容易学，但很难获胜。

entries.sentence: The newspaper headline caught my attention.
entries.chinese: headline = 大标题；报纸的大标题引起了我的注意。

entries.sentence: Photography is a relaxing hobby for me.
entries.chinese: hobby = 爱好；摄影对我来说是一项令人放松的爱好。

entries.sentence: Use your imagination to finish the story.
entries.chinese: imagination = 想象力；发挥你的想象力来完成这个故事。

entries.sentence: I read an article in a science magazine.
entries.chinese: magazine = 杂志；我在一本科学杂志上读了一篇文章。

entries.sentence: The movie starts in ten minutes.
entries.chinese: movie = 电影；电影十分钟后开始。

entries.sentence: There is a new movie theater near the station.
entries.chinese: movie theater = 电影院；车站附近有一家新电影院。

entries.sentence: The museum has a room full of dinosaur bones.
entries.chinese: museum = 博物馆；博物馆里有一个摆满恐龙骨骼的展厅。

entries.sentence: I listen to quiet music while I study.
entries.chinese: music = 音乐；我学习时会听轻柔的音乐。

entries.sentence: Nobody could explain the mystery of the missing key.
entries.chinese: mystery = 谜；没有人能解释钥匙失踪之谜。

entries.sentence: Dad reads the newspaper every morning.
entries.chinese: newspaper = 报纸；爸爸每天早上读报纸。

entries.sentence: I am reading an adventure novel about two explorers.
entries.chinese: novel = 小说；我正在读一本关于两位探险家的冒险小说。

entries.sentence: Paint the sky pale blue and the clouds white.
entries.chinese: paint = 绘画；把天空涂成浅蓝色，把云朵涂成白色。

entries.sentence: This painting shows boats in a busy harbour.
entries.chinese: painting = 画作；这幅画描绘了繁忙港口里的船只。

entries.sentence: We had a party for my cousin's birthday.
entries.chinese: party = 聚会；我们为表弟的生日举办了聚会。

entries.sentence: She wrote a short poem about the sea.
entries.chinese: poem = 诗；她写了一首关于大海的短诗。

entries.sentence: My sister listens to pop on the radio.
entries.chinese: pop = 流行音乐；我姐姐用收音机听流行音乐。

entries.sentence: My favourite science program starts at eight.
entries.chinese: program = 节目；我最喜欢的科学节目八点开始。

entries.sentence: We heard the weather report on the radio.
entries.chinese: radio = 收音机；我们从收音机里听到了天气预报。

entries.sentence: We watched the first episode of the new series.
entries.chinese: series = 系列节目；我们看了这部新系列节目的第一集。

entries.sentence: The school talent show begins at six.
entries.chinese: show = 演出；学校才艺表演六点开始。

entries.sentence: Ben promised to show up before the film began.
entries.chinese: show up = 露面；本答应在电影开始前到场。

entries.sentence: The choir sang a cheerful song.
entries.chinese: song = 歌曲；合唱团唱了一首欢快的歌曲。

entries.sentence: The soundtrack made the final scene more exciting.
entries.chinese: soundtrack = 电影配乐；电影配乐让最后一幕更加激动人心。

entries.sentence: The actors walked onto the stage together.
entries.chinese: stage = 舞台；演员们一起走上舞台。

entries.sentence: Grandma told us a story about her childhood.
entries.chinese: story = 故事；奶奶给我们讲了一个她童年时的故事。

entries.sentence: The superhero wears a red cape in the film.
entries.chinese: superhero = 超级英雄；电影里的超级英雄披着红色斗篷。

entries.sentence: Nina has a talent for playing the piano.
entries.chinese: talent = 才能；尼娜有弹钢琴的天赋。

entries.sentence: The actor spoke about his new film on a talk show.
entries.chinese: talk show = 访谈节目；这位演员在访谈节目中谈到了他的新电影。

entries.sentence: Please switch off the television before you leave.
entries.chinese: television = 电视；离开前请关掉电视。
